description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with multiple interconnected rooms and a large outdoor terrace area. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored with contrasting dark trim, and the structure includes a spacious garage with two visible cars. The terrace is furnished with several large umbrellas and a pool, suggesting a focus on outdoor leisure. Large windows and glass doors are present, especially along the terrace, allowing for ample natural light and views. The roof is mostly flat, with some sections slightly elevated, and the overall design is modern with clean lines and open spaces. The main entryway is highlighted by a prominent door and a small covered porch area.
description: A modern, single-story house with a large terrace, pool, and garage, featuring flat roofs and expansive windows. The design emphasizes open, interconnected spaces and outdoor living.
description_view_0: This view shows the garage with two cars, the main entryway, and a clear look at the terrace with umbrellas and a pool.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rear and side of the house are visible, highlighting the terrace area and the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the terrace and pool area, as well as the large windows and open layout facing the outdoor space.
description_view_3: The back of the house and the garage are prominent, with the terrace and pool area visible to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a single door with a small covered porch and modern, minimalistic detailing.
